response.justification: Bogdan has exceptional technical depth, open-source contributions, and cross-domain experience, but lacks demonstrated leadership in IT architecture, UML modeling, and team management at an executive level, and his German proficiency is only basic — a critical gap given the C1 requirement.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with real-world impact (e.g., GISCollective)
Proven full-stack expertise across languages, platforms, and high-scale systems
Strong track record in mentoring, workshops, and technical knowledge sharing
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not meeting C1 requirement
No clear evidence of UML expertise or formal IT architecture design leadership
Lacks documented experience managing teams or leading client-facing technical strategy
